description_long: This object is a modern semi-automatic handgun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular profile. The slide features serrations at the rear for improved grip during operation, and there are visible markings and engravings along the slide, including a model designation. The grip is ergonomically contoured, with a textured surface for secure handling, and the trigger guard is rounded and substantial, providing ample space for finger placement. The barrel is of standard length, flush with the slide, and the magazine base is flat and slightly beveled for easy insertion and removal. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, typical of contemporary handguns.
description: A matte black, semi-automatic handgun with engraved slide markings, textured ergonomic grip, and a flat, beveled magazine base. The design is modern and robust, with visible slide serrations and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved slide markings, rear slide serrations, and the full profile of the textured grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle opening, front sight, and the rounded trigger guard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the slide serrations, grip texture, and additional slide engravings.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, rear sight, and the top of the grip.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and ergonomically contoured, with a slightly flared base and a textured surface that appears to be stippled or checkered for enhanced traction. The material has a matte, non-reflective finish, likely polymer, and the grip panels are integrated seamlessly into the frame. There are no visible finger grooves, but the shape suggests comfort for a range of hand sizes. No logos or embellishments are visible on the grip surface.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and robust, with a smooth, thick profile that provides ample space for finger placement. It lacks undercuts or squared-off edges, maintaining a classic, functional appearance. There is no visible texturing or reinforcement, and the design is streamlined without integrated accessories.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, unadorned exterior. There are no visible threads, ports, or compensators, and the finish matches the matte black of the slide. No external markings are apparent on the barrel itself.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings on both sides, including a model name and possibly a manufacturer logo on the left side. The engravings are clear and prominent, positioned towards the front and center of the slide. The right side also displays similar markings, though less detailed in the images.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat with a slight bevel at the edges, designed for easy insertion and removal. It is flush with the bottom of the grip and lacks any finger rest, flaring, or visible logos. The design is simple and functional, with a smooth, matte finish.
